assertion_results.text: The response describes locating the digest comment using the marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' from shared/description-digest-protocol.md
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md: "Search through all returned comments for those whose body starts with the marker string `[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:`. This exact marker prefix is defined in `shared/description-digest-protocol.md` and is used by plan-feature to record a content digest at task creation time."

assertion_results.text: The response describes computing a digest of the current description (using scripts/sha256-digest.py or SHA-256) and comparing it with the stored digest
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md: "Extract the description field from the TC-9201 issue response, write it to a temporary file, and compute the digest using the project's script: `python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/desc-TC-9201.txt`" and "The format-tagged digest from `scripts/sha256-digest.py` produces the same `sha256-md:a1b2c3d4e5f67890...` value as the one stored in the comment. Result: MATCH."

assertion_results.text: The response confirms the digests match and states it will proceed silently without prompting the user — no additional latency for the happy path
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md: "The digests match. Per Step 1.5 rule 4e of the SKILL.md: when the hex digests match, proceed silently -- no additional user prompt, no added latency. The description has not been modified since plan-feature created it." Also in plan.md: "Digest comment found with matching `sha256-md` tagged digest. Created and updated timestamps are identical (no edit detected). Hex digests match. Proceeding silently."

assertion_results.text: The response does not alert the user or pause execution due to the digest check — it proceeds directly to subsequent steps
assertion_results.evidence: In digest-match.md: "No user alert is issued. No pause in execution. Proceeding directly to Step 2 (Verify Dependencies) and subsequent steps." In plan.md, the flow continues seamlessly from Step 1.5 to Step 2 ("Verify Dependencies") with no interruption or user prompt.
